name: Anchovy Yogurt Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Excellent dressing for vegetables, pasta, fish, or salads.
2. Place all ingredients in a blender and process until smooth.
3. Refrigerate to blend flavors; adjust seasoning before serving.
4. Makes about 3/4 cup.
5. Food Exchange per serving: FREE; CAL: 21; CHO: 2g; CAR: 1g; PRO: 0g; SOD: 38g; FAT: 2g.
6. Makes about 3/4 cup, serving size 1 tablespoon (12 servings).
